_NmcEmergencySearchOutput.description:
Placeholder output schema for GovAPITool registration.

Real output shape is deferred until NMC auth is provisioned.
_NmcEmergencySearchOutput.title: _NmcEmergencySearchOutput

description:
Input schema for nmc_emergency_search.

Pydantic v2 strict model (extra='forbid', frozen=True).
``mode`` is explicit because the official NMC V4 guide exposes separate
operations for coordinate lookup and regional list lookup. UMMAYA models
those operations directly; it does not silently retry one operation with
the other when an upstream response is empty.

lat.description: Coordinate-mode latitude in decimal degrees (WGS-84). Required when mode='coordinate'. Obtain from a prior coordinate-producing locate result; never guess from place names.
lat.title: Lat

limit.description: Maximum number of emergency institutions to return. Capped at 100 per NMC API contract. Defaults to 5 for citizen-facing nearby searches.
limit.title: Limit

lon.description: Coordinate-mode longitude in decimal degrees (WGS-84). Required when mode='coordinate'. Obtain from a prior coordinate-producing locate result; never guess from place names.
lon.title: Lon

mode.description: Official NMC operation selector. For citizen place-name/station/neighborhood ER searches use 'region' with q0/q1 from locate. Use 'coordinate' only when the request explicitly supplies coordinates.
mode.title: Mode

origin_lat.description: Optional original query latitude for distance sorting in region mode. Populate from the prior coordinate-producing locate adapter when available.
origin_lat.title: Origin Lat

origin_lon.description: Optional original query longitude for distance sorting in region mode. Populate from the prior coordinate-producing locate adapter when available.
origin_lon.title: Origin Lon

q0.description: Region-mode NMC Q0 시도 parameter, e.g. '부산광역시'. Required when mode='region'. Populate from kakao_coord_to_region.region_1depth_name.
q0.title: Q0

q1.description: Region-mode NMC Q1 시군구 parameter, e.g. '사하구'. Required when mode='region'. Populate from kakao_coord_to_region.region_2depth_name.
q1.title: Q1

qn.description: Optional NMC QN institution-name filter. Leave unset for general nearby ER search; do not invent a hospital name.
qn.title: Qn

title: nmc_emergency_search
